ab: itia mihu a apuki’ay itaun?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: itia, isa ianan thithu malhus.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: itia mihu a apuki’ay itaun?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: uka itaun, musaran thithu tu ikahi, amutaun thithu ya tanlhuan.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: itia mihu a apura’in itaun?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: isui makinpushaz a taun thithu, anasaya ihu makinpushaz a taun kmilhim thithu.
ch: B:他在二樓，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: itia thau itaun?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: ba! Malihan, mathuaw mataliza antu mriqaz ihun, maqitan ihu qa?
ch: B:是Malihan阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Malihan. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: maqitan! amakilhim iaku ihun amalhalhinunawan.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: intua s mihu a ama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: isa ainuz kmal’in thithu sa pania’an, apalalawak.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: muntua sa Anai?
en: Where did Anai go?

ab: mutusi thithu qalhufu smapuk sa ranaw.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: apura’in, itiza iamin munai.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: uka maniun a apura’in itaun, isai buhat thithu, itaun maniun mitalha thithu.
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: ama Tuba itiza ihu munai!
en: Uncle Tuba, you’re here!

ab: mathuaw mataliza antu mriqaz ihun, minmarutawiza ihu.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: mathuaw maqaran naak a shnaw ya mriqaz ihun.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: haya wa ung-lai pansha maniun, apisai matithi a kakadu.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: mindaaqiza antu shinai, amalalawa iaku thaithuy pashtay mulhthkiz munai makaan.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: ingqaiza uka shawashawan, uqay iaku miqilha pushawil, usui ita maharan a bukhaz malhalhinuna.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: anuniza! ingqaiza uka shawashawan, amutaun iaku.
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: kinapathay iaku haya ranaw, kathuiza ihu manataun makaan.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
